failure_reason: Login blocked. Initial SA credentials (fayaz@nulogic.io/Password@123) returned 401. Retry with Welcome@123 (advertised on login page) blocked by rate limiter (429) and then by account lockout (423 — 'Account Locked: too many failed login attempts'). Fixture gap: contract specifies Password@123 but login UI displays Password for all accounts: Welcome@123. Two login attempts (401, 429) triggered AccountLockoutService (5 attempts / 15min window). Aborted per WORKER_CONTRACT rule 7 after 2 login failures.

bugs.title: SuperAdmin credential fixture mismatch — contract says Password@123, UI/backend accepts Welcome@123
bugs.evidence: workers/w1/report.json (network log captured in this run)

bugs.title: Auth rate limiter + account lockout together block retries without clear UX — 429 + 423 indistinguishable on login form
repro: Second attempt returns 429 Too many requests
After rate window, further attempts return 423 Account Locked for 15 min
Login form does not surface which condition occurred — user sees generic failure
